_meta.purpose: Game-over cutscene GIF embeds for Time Warp: Plymouth or Jamestown.
_meta.embed_strategy: Use Tenor direct media URLs in tags. Fair-use commentary in an educational classroom context (17 U.S.C. §107). Tenor handles its own licensing with rights-holders; embedding is safer than self-hosting.
_meta.verification_method: Each URL fetched 2026-04-28 and confirmed to return Content-Type: image/gif with valid GIF89a header (not a 404 / not an HTML error page).
_meta.tone_rule_reminder: Per THEME §4 dignity rule: NONE of these GIFs may appear on a Native-character TERMINAL endgame card (Powhatan / Squanto / Massasoit final fail). Those use period-art portraits + drum/flute tail only. Universal cast is fine on early-route minor wrong-choice fails.

yzma_wrong_lever.alt: Yzma yelling WRONG LEVERRRR after Kronk pulls the wrong lever
yzma_wrong_lever.license: Fair use — educational commentary; embed via Tenor
yzma_wrong_lever.use: Universal dumb-choice gameover. THE most-used cutscene in this Time Warp — picked the obviously wrong button.

bobby_boucher_tackle.alt: Bobby Boucher tackling someone at full sprint
bobby_boucher_tackle.license: Fair use — educational commentary; embed via Tenor
bobby_boucher_tackle.use: Physical-confrontation fails: Smith ambush, mutiny, Bradford-attacks-Wampanoag, raid-loss. "MAMA SAYS WINTER IS THE DEVIL!"

terry_tate_linebacker.alt: Terry Tate, the Office Linebacker, tackling an unsuspecting office worker
terry_tate_linebacker.source: Reebok Terry Tate: Office Linebacker (Super Bowl XXXVII commercial, 2003)
terry_tate_linebacker.license: Fair use — educational commentary; embed via Tenor
terry_tate_linebacker.use: Lazy / unprepared / skipped-the-prep fails. "Didn't plant the corn," "didn't post a sentry," "skipped the work." Reskinned as the Colonial Enforcer. "YOU CAN'T STARVE ON COMPANY TIME!"

tulio_miguel_conned.alt: Tulio and Miguel together in a scheming/laughing moment
tulio_miguel_conned.license: Fair use — educational commentary; embed via Tenor
tulio_miguel_conned.use: "You got conned" fails: Rolfe-believed-the-stranger, Powhatan-trusted-Smith-too-long, fake-gold-promises, broken-treaty fails. "It's tough to be a god..."

rickroll_cherry.alt: Rick Astley dancing in the iconic Never Gonna Give You Up music video
rickroll_cherry.source: Rick Astley — Never Gonna Give You Up music video (RCA, 1987)
rickroll_cherry.license: Fair use — educational commentary; embed via Tenor
rickroll_cherry.use: Universal cherry-on-top, final 3-second sting on every COMEDIC gameover. "Never gonna give you up... to dysentery." PROHIBITED on Native-character TERMINAL endgame cards (Powhatan/Squanto/Massasoit final cards) per THEME §4 dignity rule — those get a clean cedar-drum tail instead.
